mapper.insert: insert into `user` (username, password, nickname, phone, create_time) values (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{phone}, NOW())
mapper.update: update `user` set username = #{username}, nickname = #{nickname}, phone = #{phone}, create_time = NOW() , is_deleted = #{isDeleted} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select * from `user` where username like concat('%',#{username},'%') and is_deleted = 0
